tables.name: customers
tables.description: Customer records with currency and business segment classification. Contains 353 customers.

columns.name: currency
columns.description: Currency used by the customer for transactions. Type: TEXT. Values: 'CZK' (Czech Koruna) or 'EUR' (Euro).

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique customer identifier. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '1889', '1319', '2560'.

columns.name: segment
columns.description: Business segment classification of the customer. Type: TEXT. Values: 'SME' (Small/Medium Enterprise), 'KAM' (Key Account Management), 'LAM' (Large Account Management).

tables.name: gasstations
tables.description: Gas station locations with chain affiliation and market segment. Contains 342 stations.

columns.name: chain_id
columns.description: Identifier for the gas station chain. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '24', '1', '2', '8', '13'.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country where the gas station is located. Type: TEXT. Values: 'CZE' (Czech Republic) and possibly others.

columns.name: gas_station_id
columns.description: Unique gas station identifier. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '457', '214', '541'.

columns.name: segment
columns.description: Market segment/positioning of the gas station. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Discount', 'Premium', 'Noname', 'Value for money'.

tables.name: products
tables.description: Product catalog for items available at gas stations. Contains 342 products.

columns.name: description
columns.description: Description of the product or service. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'UTA-Box (blocking)', 'Intervention', 'Toll DEU(dirrect Acceptance)', 'Provoz.nápl.' (operational fluids), 'TIS PL toll'.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Unique product identifier. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '290', '307', '232', '23', '281'.

tables.name: transactions_1k
tables.description: Transaction records for debit card purchases at gas stations. Contains 341 transactions.

columns.name: amount
columns.description: Quantity of the product purchased. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '19', '3', '25', '6'.

columns.name: card_id
columns.description: Debit card identifier used for the transaction. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '693615', '666939'.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Customer who made the transaction. References customers.CustomerID. Type: TEXT (numeric string).

columns.name: date
columns.description: Date of the transaction. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD format). Examples: '2012-08-24'.

columns.name: gas_station_id
columns.description: Gas station where the transaction occurred. References gasstations.GasStationID. Type: TEXT (numeric string).

columns.name: price
columns.description: Total price of the transaction in the customer's currency. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '454.54', '59.31', '566.49', '5.44'.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Product purchased. References products.ProductID. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '2', '317'.

columns.name: time
columns.description: Time of the transaction. Type: TEXT (HH:MM:SS format). Examples: '18:27:00', '16:56:00', '09:18:00'.

columns.name: transaction_id
columns.description: Unique transaction identifier. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '458', '230', '20', '98', '400'.

tables.name: yearmonth
tables.description: Monthly aggregated consumption data per customer. Contains 357 records.

columns.name: consumption
columns.description: Total consumption amount for the month. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Can be negative (credits/refunds). Examples: '72140.84', '301.37', '-1014.55', '43.44'.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Customer identifier. References customers.CustomerID. Type: TEXT (numeric string).

columns.name: date
columns.description: Year-month period in YYYYMM format. Type: TEXT. Examples: '201307' (July 2013), '201308' (Aug 2013), '201208' (Aug 2012).
